english translation text: Ziyarat Nahiya

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى آدَمَ صِفْوَةِ اللهِ مِنْ خَليقَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Adam, the chosen one of Allah from among His creation.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى شَيْثٍ وَلِيِّ اللهِ وَ خِيَرَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Seth (Shaith), the friend of Allah and His elite.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى إدْريسَ الْقائِمِ للهِِ بِحُجَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Enoch (Idris), who established (religion) on behalf of Allah by His authority.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى نُوحٍ الْمُجابِ في دَعْوَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Noah (Nuh), whose invocation (for punishment) was answered.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى هُودٍ الْمَمْدُودِ مِنَ اللهِ بِمَعُونَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Hud, who was assisted through Allah’s aid.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى صالِحِ الَّذي تَوَّجَهُ اللهُ بِكَرامَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Salih, whom Allah crowned with His generosity.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى إبْراهيمَ الَّذي حَباهُ اللهُ بِخُلَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Abraham (Ibrahim), whom Allah endowed with His friendship.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى إسْماعيلَ الَّذي فَداهُ اللهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظيمٍ مِنْ جَنَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Ishmael (Isma’il), whom Allah ransomed with a great sacrifice from His Heaven.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى إسْحاقَ الَّذي جَعَلَ اللهُ النُّبُوَّةَ في ذُرِّيَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Isaac (Is’haq), in whose progeny Allah placed prophethood.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى يَعْقُوبَ الَّذي رَدَّ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ بَصَرَهُ بِرَحْمَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Jacob (Ya’qub), for whom Allah restored his sight by His mercy.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى يُوسُفَ الَّذي نَجّاهُ اللهُ مِنَ الْجُبِّ بِعَظَمَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Joseph (Yusuf), whom Allah rescued from the well by His majesty.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مُوسَى الَّذي فَلَقَ اللهُ الْبَحْرَ لَهُ بِقُدْرَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Moses (Musa), the one for whom Allah split the sea with His Power.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى هارُونَ الَّذي خَصَّهُ اللهُ بِنُبُوَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Aaron (Harun), whom Allah distinguished with his prophethood.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى شُعَيْبِ الَّذي نَصَرَهُ اللهُ عَلى اُمَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Jethro (Shu’aib), whom Allah made victorious over his people.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى داوُدَ الَّذي تابَ اللهُ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَطيئَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon David (Dawud), to whom Allah turned (in mercy) after his mistake.[1]

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى سُلَيْمانَ الَّذي ذَلَّتْ لَهُ الْجِنُّ بِعِزَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Solomon (Sulaiman), for whom Allah made the Jinn subservient by His majesty.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى أيُّوبَ الَّذي شَفاهُ اللهُ مِنْ عِلَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Job (Ayyub), whom Allah cured after his (prolonged) illness.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى يُونُسَ الَّذي أنْجَزَ اللهُ لَهُ مَضْمُونَ عِدَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Jonah (Yunus), for whom Allah fulfilled the purport of His promise.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى عُزَيْرِ الَّذي أحْياهُ اللهُ بَعْدَ ميتَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Ezra (Uzair), whom Allah brought to life after his death.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى زَكَرِيّا الصّابِرِ في مِحْنَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Zechariah (Zakariyya), who remained patient in his tribulations.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى يَحْيَى الَّذي أزْلَفَهُ اللهُ بِشَهادَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon John (Yahya), whom Allah drew near (his rank) by his martyrdom.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى عيسى رُوحِ اللهِ وَ كَلِمَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Jesus (Isa), the spirit of Allah and His word.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ حَبيبِ اللهِ وَ صِفْوَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Muhammad, the beloved of Allah and His elite.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى أميرِالْمُؤْمِنينَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أبي طالِبٍ الْمَخْصُوصِ بِاُخُوَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the Leader of the Faithful, Ali Ibn Abi Talib, who was exclusively selected for brotherhood to him (the Prophet (PBUH&HF)).
Peace be upon Fatima al-Zahra, his daughter.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى أبي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ وَصِيِّ أبيهِ وَ خَليفَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon Abu Muhammad al-Hasan, the executor of (the will of) his father, and his successor.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَى الْحُسَيْنِ الَّذي سَمَحَتْ نَفْسُهُ بِمُهْجَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon al-Husain, who sacrificed himself up to the last drops of the blood of his heart.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ أطاعَ اللهَ في سِرِّهِ وَ عَلانِيَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon him, who obeyed Allah secretly and openly.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ جَعَلَ اللهُ الشِّفاءَ في تُرْبَتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon whom Allah placed a cure in the soil of his place (of martyrdom).

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنِ الإجابَةُ تَحْتَ قُبَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one under whose dome answer (to supplications) is guaranteed.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنِ الأئِمَّةُ مِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِهِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one in whose descendants are the Imams (after him).
Peace be upon the son of the seal of the prophets.
Peace be upon the son of the chief of the executors.
Peace be upon the son of Fatima, the radiant.
Peace be upon the son of Khadija, the great.
Peace be upon the son of the lote-tree in the outermost boundary (of Heaven).[1]
Peace be upon the son of the Garden of refuge.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَى ابْنِ زَمْزَمَ وَ الصَّفا،
english translation text: Peace be upon the son of Zamzam and al-Safaa.
Peace be upon him, who was saturated in (his) blood.
Peace be upon him, whose tents were violated.
Peace be upon the fifth of the People of the Cloak.
Peace be upon the loneliest of the lonely.
Peace be upon the (greatest) martyr of all martyrs.
Peace be upon him, who was slain by the individuals of illegitimate birth.
Peace be upon the one who is at rest in Karbala.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ بَكَتْهُ مَلائِكَةُ السَّماءِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one for whom the heavenly Angels wept.
Peace be upon the one whose descendants are the pure.
Peace be upon the chief of the religion.
Peace be upon the places of the (divine) proofs.
Peace be upon the Imams, the masters (of mankind).
Peace be upon the bloodstained chests.
Peace be upon the parched lips.
Peace be upon the plucked souls.
Peace be upon the snatched spirits.
Peace be upon the stripped corpses.
Peace be upon the pallid bodies.
Peace be upon the gushing bloods.
Peace be upon the dismembered limbs.
Peace be upon the heads raised upon lances.
Peace be upon the women (forcibly) exposed.
Peace be upon the Proof of the Lord of the worlds.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلى آبائِكَ الطّاهِرينَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you and upon your pure ancestors.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلى أبْنائِكَ الْمُسْتَشْهَدينَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you and upon your martyred sons.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلى ذُرِّيَّتِكَ النّاصِرينَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you and upon your children who aided (you).

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَ عَلَى الْمَلائِكَةِ الْمُضاجِعينَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you and upon the accompanying Angels.
Peace be upon the slain and the oppressed one.
Peace be upon his poisoned brother (Imam al-Hasan).
Peace be upon Ali, the elder (Ali al-Akbar).
Peace be upon the suckling infant (Ali al-Asghar).
Peace be upon the plundered bodies.
Peace be upon the family and children who were nearby (the place of martyrdom) [who were without support among strangers].
Peace be upon the mangled corpses (left) in the desert.
Peace be upon those who were left far from their homeland.
Peace be upon those who were buried without shrouds.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَى الرُّؤُوسِ الْمُفَرَّقَةِ عَنِ الأبْدانِ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the heads severed from the bodies.
Peace be upon the bereaved and the patient one.
Peace be upon the oppressed one who was without a helper.
Peace be upon the inhabitant of the purified soil.
Peace be upon the possessor of the lofty dome.
Peace be upon him, whom the Almighty purified.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنِ افْتَخَرَ بِهِ جَبْرَئيلُ،
english translation text: Peace be upon him, of whom Gabriel (Jabra’il) was proud.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ ناغاهُ فِي الْمَهْدِ ميكائيلُ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one to whom Michael (Mika’il) spoke tenderly in the cradle.
Peace be upon the one whose pact was broken.
Peace be upon the one whose rights and dignity were violated.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ اُريقَ بِالظُّلْمِ دَمُهُ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one whose blood was shed unjustly.
Peace be upon the one who was bathed in the blood of his wounds.
Peace be upon the one who tasted the spears raining down over his body.
Peace be upon the one against whom people came together and made lawful the shedding of his blood.
Peace be upon the one slaughtered in public.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلى مَنْ دَفَنَهُ أهْلُ الْقُرى،
english translation text: Peace be upon the one who was buried by the strangers from (nearby) villages.
Peace be upon the one whose aorta was severed.
Peace be upon the defender who had no helper.
Peace be upon the gray hair that was dyed (with blood).
Peace be upon the cheek that struck the dust.
Peace be upon the butchered body.
Peace be upon the front teeth that were beaten with a rod.
Peace be upon the head raised (upon a lance).

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَى الأجْسامِ الْعارِيَةِ فِي الْفَلَواتِ، تَنْهَشُهَا الذِّئابُ الْعادِياتُ، وَ تَخْتَلِفُ إلَيْهَا السِّباعُ الضّارِياتُ،
english translation text: Peace be upon the unclothed corpses in the desert, bitten by wild wolves[1] and around whom the beasts of prey prowled.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يا مَوْلايَ وَ عَلَى الْمَلائِكَةِ الْمُرَفْرَفينَ حَوْلَ قُبَّتِكَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you, O my master, and the Angels who flutter around your dome,

arabic text: الْحافّينَ بِتُرْبَتِكَ، الطّائِفينَ بِعَرْصَتِكَ، الْوارِدينَ لِزِيارَتِكَ،
english translation text: surround your grave, circumambulate your courtyard, and come for your visitation.

arabic text: اَلسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ فَإنّي قَصَدْتُ إلَيْكَ، وَ رَجَوْتُ الْفَوْزَ لَدَيْكَ،
english translation text: Peace be upon you! Indeed, I intended your visitation, and I am hopeful of achieving the prosperity that is with you.
Salutations to you,

arabic text: سَلامَ الْعارِفِ بِحُرْمَتِكَ، الْمُخْلِصِ في وِلايَتِكَ، الْمُتَقَرِّبِ إلَى اللهِ بِمَحَبَّتِكَ، الْبَريءِ مِنْ أعْدائِكَ،
english translation text: Salutations from he who recognizes your sanctity, is a sincere (believer) in your guardianship, seeks nearness to Allah through your love, and is aloof from your enemies,

arabic text: سَلامَ مَنْ قَلْبُهُ بِمُصابِكَ مَقْرُوحٌ، وَ دَمْعُهُ عِنْدَ ذِكْرِكَ مَسْفُوحٌ،
english translation text: Salutations from the one whose heart is wounded due to the tribulations you have suffered, and whose tears flow in your remembrance,
Salutations from the one who is distressed, grief-stricken, distracted, and yielding,

arabic text: سَلامَ مَنْ لَوْ كانَ مَعَكَ بِالطُّفُوفِ، لَوَقاكَ بِنَفْسِهِ حَدَّ السُّيُوفِ، وَ بَذَلَ حُشاشَتَهُ دُونَكَ لِلْحُتُوفِ،
english translation text: Salutations from the one, who, had he been present with you in that plain, would have shielded you from the sharpness of the swords with his body and sacrificed his last breath for you,

arabic text: وَ جاهَدَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ، وَ نَصَرَكَ عَلى مَنْ بَغى عَلَيْكَ، وَ فَداكَ بِرُوحِهِ وَ جَسَدِهِ وَ مالِهِ وَ وَلَدِهِ،
english translation text: would have struggled beside you, helped you against the aggressors, and redeemed you with his soul, body, wealth, and children,
(Salutations from the one) whose soul is a sacrifice for yours,
and whose family is a shield for yours.

arabic text: فَلَئِنْ أخَّرَتْنِي الدُّهُورُ، وَ عاقَني عَنْ نَصْرِكَ الْمَقْدُورُ،
english translation text: But as I have been hindered by the course of time and as (Allah’s) decree has prevented me from helping you,

arabic text: وَ لَمْ أكُنْ لِمَنْ حارَبَكَ مُحارِباً، وَ لِمَنْ نَصَبَ لَكَ الْعَداوَةَ مُناصِباً،
english translation text: and as I could not fight those who fought you, and was not able to show hostility to those who showed hostility to you,

arabic text: فَلَأَنْدُبَنَّكَ صَباحاً وَ مَساءً وَ لَأَبْكِيَنَّ لَكَ بَدَلَ الدُّمُوعِ دَماً، حَسْرَةً عَلَيْكَ وَ تَأسُّفاً عَلى ما دَهاكَ وَ تَلَهُّفاً،
english translation text: I will, therefore, lament you morning and evening, and will weep blood in place of tears, out of my anguish for you and my sorrow for all that befell you,

arabic text: حَتّى أمُوتَ بِلَوْعَةِ الْمُصابِ، وَ غُصَّةِ الإكْتِيابِ،
english translation text: until I meet death from the pain of the catastrophe and the choking grief.

arabic text: أشْهَدُ أ نَّكَ قَدْ أقَمْتَ الصَّلوةَ، وَ آتَيْتَ الزَّكوةَ،
english translation text: I bear witness that you certainly established prayer, gave alms,

arabic text: وَ أمَرْتَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ، وَ نَهَيْتَ عَنِ الْمُنْكَرِ وَ الْعُدْوانِ،
english translation text: enjoined good, forbade evil and transgression,

arabic text: وَ أطَعْتَ اللهَ وَ ما عَصَيْتَهُ، وَ تَمَسَّكْتَ بِهِ وَ بِحَبْلِهِ
english translation text: obeyed Allah, never disobeyed Him, and held fast to Him and to His rope.

arabic text: فَأرْضَيْتَهُ وَ خَشيتَهُ وَ راقَبْتَهُ وَ اسْتَجَبْتَهُ،
english translation text: Then, you pleased Him, held Him in awe, were attentive towards Him, and were responsive to Him,

arabic text: وَ سَنَنْتَ السُّنَنَ، وَ أطْفَأْتَ الْفِتَنَ،
english translation text: established the customs (of the Prophet (PBUH&HF)), extinguished turmoil (in religion),

arabic text: وَ دَعَوْتَ إلَى الرَّشادِ، وَ أوْضَحْتَ سُبُلَ السَّدادِ، وَ جاهَدْتَ فِي اللهِ حَقَّ الْجِهادِ،
english translation text: invited people to rectitude, clarified the ways of righteousness, and truly strove in the way of Allah.
You were an obedient one to Allah,

arabic text: وَ لِجَدِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ تابِعاً،
english translation text: a follower of your grandfather, Muhammad, peace be upon him and his family,
heedful of the saying of your father,
quick to execute the will of your brother,

arabic text: وَ لِعِمادِ الدّينِ رافِعاً، وَ لِلطُّغْيانِ قامِعاً،
english translation text: an erector of the pillars of the religion, a suppressor of tyranny,

arabic text: وَ لِلطُّغاةِ مُقارِعاً، وَ لِلأُمَّةِ ناصِحاً،
english translation text: an advancer on the transgressors, and a sincere exhorter for the nation,
a traveler into mortal throes,

arabic text: وَ لِلْفُسّاقِ مُكافِحاً، وَ بِحُجَجِ اللهِ قائِماً،
english translation text: a warrior against the wretched, and a maintainer of Allah’s proofs (on earth),
compassionate towards Islam and Muslims,

arabic text: وَ لِلْحَقِّ ناصِراً، وَ عِنْدَ الْبَلاءِ صابِراً،
english translation text: a champion of truth and most patient in adversity,

arabic text: وَ لِلدّينِ كالِئاً، وَ عَنْ حَوْزَتِهِ مُرامِياً،
english translation text: a protector for the religion, and a defender of its domain.
You safeguarded the right path and supported it,
spread justice and promoted it,
advocated the faith and manifested it,
restrained and reproached the frivolous,
took back (the rights) of the lowly from the privileged,

arabic text: وَ تُساوي فِي الْحُكْمِ بَيْنَ الْقَوِيِّ وَ الضَّعيفِ،
english translation text: and were equitable in your arbitrations between the weak and the strong.

arabic text: كُنْتَ رَبيعَ الأيْتامِ، وَ عِصْمَةَ الأنامِ، وَ عِزَّ الإسْلامِ،
english translation text: You were the springtime of the orphans, the protection of humanity, the glory of Islam,

arabic text: وَ مَعْدِنَ الأحْكامِ، وَ حَليفَ الإنْعامِ،
english translation text: the treasure of divine laws, and a relentless ally of benevolence.

arabic text: سالِكاً طَرائِقَ [في طَريقَةِ] جَدِّكَ وَ أبيكَ،
english translation text: You pursued the path of your grandfather and your father,
resembled your brother in will,
were loyal to your obligations, possessed pleasant manners,
embodied generosity, and spent the darkness (of night) in prayer.

arabic text: قَويمَ الطَّرائِقِ، كَريمَ الْخَلائِقِ، عَظيمَ السَّوابِقِ،
english translation text: You were the straightest path, the most generous of the creation, and had the brightest record.

arabic text: شَريفَ النَّسَبِ، مُنيفَ الْحَسَبِ، رَفيعَ الرُّتَبِ،
english translation text: You were of great ancestry, noble descent, and lofty rank.

arabic text: كَثيرَ الْمَناقِبِ، مَحْمُودَ الضَّرائِبِ، جَزيلَ الْمَواهِبِ،
english translation text: You possessed plentiful merits, praiseworthy manners, and were abundant in endowments.

arabic text: حَليمٌ رَشيدٌ مُنيبٌ، جَوادٌ عَليمٌ شَديدٌ،
english translation text: You were forbearing, upright, always turning (to Allah), generous, knowledgeable, strong,

arabic text: إمامٌ شَهيدٌ، أوّاهٌ مُنيبٌ، حَبيبٌ مَهيبٌ،
english translation text: a martyred Imam, grieved, repentant with earnest prayers (to Allah), dearly loved, and awesome.

arabic text: كُنْتَ لِلرَّسُولِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَلَداً،
english translation text: You were to the Messenger, peace be upon him and his family, a son,
for the Quran, an authority [a savior],
and for the nation, a support.
You were diligent in obedience,
a protector of the covenant and oath,
keeping away from the paths of the debauched,
sparing no effort (in fulfilling the duties),
performing prolonged bowing and prostrations,

arabic text: زاهِداً فِي الدُّنْيا زُهْدَ الرّاحِلِ عَنْها،
english translation text: abstaining from the world, like one who is departing from it,
looking upon it (the world) through the eyes of one estranged (from it).
Your desires from it (the world) were abstentious,
your efforts were far-removed from its embellishments,
your glances removed from its joys,
and your desire for the hereafter was well-known,
even when tyranny became wide-spread,
injustice removed its veil,
wickedness called upon its followers,

arabic text: وَ أنْتَ في حَرَمِ جَدِّكَ قاطِنٌ،
english translation text: and you were residing in the sanctuary of your grandfather,
detached from the oppressors,
sitting in the house and the prayer niche,
unattached to (worldly) pleasures and carnal desires,

arabic text: تُنْكِرُ الْمُنْكَرَ بِقَلْبِكَ وَ لِسانِكَ، عَلى حَسَبِ طاقَتِكَ وَ إمْكانِكَ،
english translation text: and renouncing evil in your heart and on your tongue to the extent of your strength and ability.
Then the knowledge demanded you for disavowal (of falsehood),
and made it incumbent on you to struggle against the deviant.

arabic text: فَسِرْتَ في أوْلادِكَ وَ أهاليكَ، وَ شيعَتِكَ وَ مَواليكَ
english translation text: Therefore, you set out in company of your children, kinsfolk, followers, and supporters,
disclosed the truth and clear proofs,

arabic text: وَ دَعَوْتَ إلَى اللهِ بِالْحِكْمَةِ وَ الْمَوْعِظَةِ الْحَسَنَةِ،
english translation text: summoned people towards Allah with wisdom and fine exhortation,

arabic text: وَ أمَرْتَ بِإقامَةِ الْحُدُودِ، وَ الطّاعَةِ لِلْمَعْبُودِ،
english translation text: ordered the establishment of the limits of divine law, and the obedience to the One Who should be worshipped,

arabic text: وَ نَهَيْتَ عَنِ الْخَبائِثِ وَ الطُّغْيانِ،
english translation text: and forbade (people) from wickedness and oppression.
But, they confronted you with injustice and aggression.

arabic text: فَجاهَدْتَهُمْ بَعْدَ الإيعازِ لَهُمْ [الإيعادِ إلَيْهِمْ] وَ تَأْكيدِ الْحُجَّةِ عَلَيْهِمْ،
english translation text: Therefore, you resisted them after advising them and stressing over (divine) proofs against them.
However, they violated your (divine) rights and oath.
angered your Lord and your grandfather,
and initiated battle against you.
Hence, you stood firm to spear and strike,

arabic text: وَ طَحَنْتَ جُنُودَ الْفُجّارِ، وَ اقْتَحَمْتَ قَسْطَلَ الْغُبارِ،
english translation text: pulverized the soldiers of the transgressors, and stormed (courageously) into the dust of the battle,

arabic text: مُجالِداً بِذِى الْفَقارِ، كَأنَّكَ عَلِيٌّ الْمُخْتارُ،
english translation text: fighting with Thulfaqar[1] as if you were Ali, the chosen one.

arabic text: فَلَمّا رَأوْكَ ثابِتَ الْجاشِ، غَيْرَ خائِفٍ وَ لا خاشٍ،
english translation text: So when they saw you firm, fearless, and courageous,

arabic text: نَصَبُوا لَكَ غَوائِلَ مَكْرِهِمْ، وَ قاتَلُوكَ بِكَيْدِهِمْ وَ شَرِّهِمْ،
english translation text: they set up their most malicious deceptions against you, and fought you with their deceit and viciousness.

arabic text: وَ أمَرَ اللَّعينُ جُنُودَهُ، فَمَنَعُوكَ الْماءَ وَ وُرُودَهُ،
english translation text: The accursed one (Umar Ibn Sa’d) commanded his soldiers, and thus, they prevented you from reaching or receiving water.

arabic text: وَ ناجَزُوكَ الْقِتالَ، وَ عاجَلُوكَ النِّزالَ،
english translation text: They rushed to engage you in combat, descended swiftly upon you,
showering you with arrows and stones,
and moving towards you with uprooting hands.

arabic text: وَ لَمْ يَرْعَوْا لَكَ ذِماماً، وَ لا راقَبُوا فيكَ أثاماً، في قَتْلِهِمْ أوْلِياءَكَ، وَ نَهْبِهِمْ رِحالَكَ،
english translation text: Neither they respected your rights, nor were they mindful of retribution for slaying you and your companions, and plundering your belongings.

arabic text: وَ أنْتَ مُقَدَّمٌ فِي الْهَبَواتِ، وَ مُحْتَمِلٌ لِلأذِيّاتِ،
english translation text: You were in the front line of the storm (of battle), enduring afflictions.

arabic text: قَدْ عَجِبَتْ مِنْ صَبْرِكَ مَلائِكَةُ السَّماواتِ،
english translation text: Indeed, the angels of the heavens were astonished by your patience.
The enemy then surrounded you from all sides,
weakened you by inflicting wounds,

arabic text: وَ حالُوا بَيْنَكَ وَ بَيْنَ الرَّواحِ،
english translation text: prevented you from taking any repose,
and you had no helper remaining.
You were bereaved yet patient,
defending your women and children,
until they caused you to fall from your horse.
You fell to the ground, wounded,
horses trampled you with their hooves,
tyrants raised their swords against you,
the sweat of death appeared on your forehead,

arabic text: وَ اخْتَلَفَتْ بِالاِنْقِباضِ وَ الإنْبِساطِ شِمالُكَ وَ يَمينُكَ،
english translation text: and you continually clenched and unclenched your hands,

arabic text: تُديرُ طَرْفاً خَفِيّاً إلى رَحْلِكَ وَ بَيْتِكَ،
english translation text: secretly gazing upon your caravan and tents,

arabic text: وَ قَدْ شُغِلْتَ بِنَفْسِكَ عَنْ وُلْدِكَ وَ أهاليكَ،
english translation text: while trapped by yourself away from your children and family.

arabic text: وَ أسْرَعَ فَرَسُكَ شارِداً، إلى خِيامِكَ قاصِداً، مُحَمْحِماً باكِياً،
english translation text: (At that time,) your horse distractedly galloped towards your camp, neighing and crying.
When the women saw your horse distraught,
and observed your saddle contorted,
they came from the tents,
disheveling their hair,
striking their now unveiled cheeks,
calling you by lamenting and wailing,
being humiliated after being honored,
hastening to where you lay wounded.
At that time Shimr (L) was sitting on your chest,
quenching his sword with (the blood of) your throat,
grabbing your beard with his hand,
as he slew you with his sword.
Your faculties faded,
your breath became shallow and ceased,
and your head was raised onto a spear.
Your family were captured like slaves,

arabic text: وَ صُفِّدُوا فِي الْحَديدِ فَوْقَ أقْتابِ الْمَطِيّاتِ،
english translation text: bound with iron chains atop camels,
with midday heat scorching their faces.
They were driven across deserts and wastelands,
with their hands chained to their necks,
and were paraded around the markets.
Woe be unto the wicked transgressors!
Certainly, by killing you, they have killed Islam,[1]
disrupted (the truth of) prayer and fasting,
revoked the (prophetic) customs and the (divine) laws,
destroyed the pillars of faith,
distorted the verses of the Quran,

arabic text: وَ هَمْلَجُوا فِي الْبَغْيِ وَ الْعُدْوانِ،
english translation text: and brutally rushed into tyranny and aggression.

arabic text: لَقَدْ أصْبَحَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ مَوْتُوراً،
english translation text: Certainly, (by this event,) the Messenger of Allah (PBUH&HF)was wronged, left alone, and denied vengeance,

arabic text: وَ عادَ كِتابُ اللهِ عَزَّوَجَلَّ مَهْجُوراً،
english translation text: the Book of Allah, the mighty and the majestic, was again abandoned,

arabic text: وَ غُودِرَ الْحَقُّ إذْ قُهِرْتَ مَقْهُوراً،
english translation text: truth was betrayed when you were forcibly overcome,

arabic text: وَ فُقِدَ بِفَقْدِكَ التَّكْبيرُ وَ التَّهْليلُ،
english translation text: And with your loss, call for Allah’s glorification and His Unity,

arabic text: وَالتَّحْريمُ وَ التَّحْليلُ، وَ التَّنْزيلُ وَ التَّأْويلُ،
english translation text: His prohibitions, sanctions, revelation, and interpretation were lost.

arabic text: وَ ظَهَرَ بَعْدَكَ التَّغْييرُ وَ التَّبْديلُ، وَ الإلْحادُ وَ التَّعْطيلُ، وَ الأهْواءُ وَ الأضاليلُ، وَ الْفِتَنُ وَ الأباطيلُ،
english translation text: After you, alteration, distortion, infidelity, abandonment (of the Islamic laws), vagary, misguidance, turmoil and falsehood became prevalent.

arabic text: فَقامَ ناعيكَ عِنْدَ قَبْرِ جَدِّكَ الرَّسُولِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ،
english translation text: The announcer of your martyrdom came near the grave of your grandfather, the Messenger (PBUH&HF),
gave the news to him with tears flowing, saying:

arabic text: يا رَسُولَ اللهِ، قُتِلَ سِبْطُكَ وَ فَتاكَ،
english translation text: 0 the Messenger of Allah! Your brave grandson was slain,
and abuse of your family and supporters were deemed lawful.
After you, your progeny were captured,

arabic text: وَ وَقَعَ الْمَحْذُورُ بِعِتْرَتِكَ وَ ذَويكَ،
english translation text: and adversity befell your family and your offspring.

arabic text: فَانْزَعَجَ الرَّسُولُ، وَ بَكى قَلْبُهُ الْمَهُولُ،
english translation text: Indeed, the Messenger (PBUH&HF) became distressed and his depressed heart wept,

arabic text: وَ عَزّاهُ بِكَ الْمَلائِكَةُ وَ الأنْبِياءُ،
english translation text: The Angels and the prophets offered their condolences to him for your martyrdom,
Your mother, al-Zahra, became distressed and bereft of you,

arabic text: وَ اخْتَلَفَتْ جُنُودُ الْمَلائِكَةِ الْمُقَرَّبينَ، تُعَزّي أباكَ أميرَالْمُؤْمِنينَ،
english translation text: Legions of favored Angels came in waves to offer their condolences to your father, the Leader of the Faithful,

arabic text: وَ اُقيمَتْ لَكَ الْمَآتِمُ في أعْلا عِلِّيّينَ،
english translation text: Mourning commemorations were held for you in the utmost exalted place Heaven,
and the dark-eyed Maidens (of Paradise) hit their own heads and faces in grief,
The skies and their inhabitants wept,
as did Paradise and its keepers,
the mountains and their surroundings,
the oceans and their fishes,
the heavens and their servants,
the House (Ka’ba), and the Station (of Abraham),
the Sacred Monument,
and Mecca and its sanctuary.
O Allah! By the sanctity of this exalted place (the tomb of Imam al-Husain (PBUH)),

arabic text: صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
english translation text: bestow blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,
assemble me in their company,
and admit me to Paradise by their intercession.

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي أتَوَسَّلُ إلَيْكَ يا أسْرَعَ الْحاسِبينَ،
english translation text: My Allah! I implore You, O He who is the quickest of the reckoners!

arabic text: وَ ياأكْرَمَ الأكْرَمينَ، وَ ياأحْكَمَ الْحاكِمينَ،
english translation text: O the most generous of the generous and the wisest of judges!

arabic text: بِمُحَمَّدٍ خاتَمِ النَّبِيّينَ، رَسُولِكَ إلَى الْعالَمينَ أجْمَعينَ،
english translation text: By Muhammad, the seal of the prophets, Your Messenger to all the worlds,

arabic text: وَ بِأخيهِ وَ ابْنِ عَمِّهِ الأنْزَعِ الْبَطينِ، الْعالِمِ الْمَكينِ، عَلِيٍّ أميرِ الْمُؤْمِنينَ،
english translation text: By his brother and cousin, the uprooter of hidden polytheism, the distinguished and learned, Ali, the Prince of the Faithful,
By Fatima, the chief of women of the worlds,
By al-Hasan, the purified one and the protection of the pious,

arabic text: وَ بِأبي عَبْدِاللهِ الْحُسَيْنِ أكْرَمِ الْمُسْتَشْهَدينَ،
english translation text: By Abi Abdillah, al-Husain, the most honored martyr,

arabic text: وَ بِأوْلادِهِ الْمَقْتُولينَ، وَ بِعِتْرَتِهِ الْمَظْلُومينَ،
english translation text: By his slain children and oppressed family,

arabic text: وَ بِعَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ زَيْنِ الْعابِدينَ،
english translation text: By Ali Ibn al-Husain, the ornament of the worshippers,

arabic text: وَ بِمُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ قِبْلَةِ الأوّابينَ،
english translation text: By Muhammad Ibn Ali, the direction of those who turn to Allah,

arabic text: وَ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ أصْدَقِ الصّادِقينَ،
english translation text: By Ja’far Ibn Muhammad, the most truthful,

arabic text: وَ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ مُظْهِرِ الْبَراهينَ،
english translation text: By Musa Ibn Ja’far, the discloser of the proofs,

arabic text: وَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسى ناصِرِ الدّينِ،
english translation text: By Ali Ibn Musa, the helper of the religion,

arabic text: وَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ قُدْوَةِ الْمُهْتَدينَ،
english translation text: By Muhammad Ibn Ali, the exemplar of those who accepted guidance,

arabic text: وَ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ أزْهَدِ الزّاهِدينَ،
english translation text: By Ali Ibn Muhammad, the most ascetic,

arabic text: وَ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ وارِثِ الْمُسْتَخْلَفينَ،
english translation text: By Hasan Ibn Ali, the inheritor of the appointed ones,
By the Proof upon all creation (al-Mahdi),

arabic text: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ،
english translation text: Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: الصّادِقينَ الأبَرّينَ، آلِ طه وَ يس،
english translation text: the most truthful and devoted ones (who are) the family ofTaha and Yasin,[1]

arabic text: وَ أنْ تَجْعَلَني فِي الْقِيامَةِ مِنَ الآمِنينَ الْمُطْمَئِنّينَ،
english translation text: and place me on the Day of Judgment among those who are safe, confident,
triumphant, happy, and felicitous.
O Allah! Destine me to be amongst the submitters,
Join me with the righteous,[1]

arabic text: وَاجْعَلْ لي لِسانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الآخِرينَ،
english translation text: Ordain for me (offspring with) truthful tongue among the last generation,[2]
Make me victorious over the transgressors,
Suffice me the deception of the envious,
Turn away from me the evil plans of the schemers,
Hold back from me the hands of the oppressors,

arabic text: وَاجْمَعْ بَيْني وَ بَيْنَ السّادَةِ الْمَيامينِ في أعْلا عِلِّيّينَ،
english translation text: Gather me with the blessed masters in the utmost exalted place of Heaven,

arabic text: مَعَ الَّذينَ أنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنَ النَّبِيّينَ وَ الصِّدّيقينَ وَ الشُّهَداءِ وَ الصّالِحينَ،
english translation text: along with whom You have bestowed favor, from among the prophets, the truthful, the martyrs, and the righteous,[]
By Your mercy, O the most merciful of the merciful.

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ إنّي اُقْسِمُ عَلَيْكَ بِنَبِيِّكَ الْمَعْصُومِ،
english translation text: O Allah! I implore You by Your infallible Prophet,

arabic text: وَ بِحُكْمِكَ الْمَحْتُومِ، وَ نُهْيَكَ [نَهْيِكَ] الْمَكْتُومِ،
english translation text: by Your definite judgment, and Your concealed preventive wisdom,

arabic text: وَ بِهذَا الْقَبْرِ الْمَلْمُومِ، الْمُوَسَّدِ في كَنَفِهِ الإمامُ الْمَعْصُومُ، الْمَقْتُولُ الْمَظْلُومُ،
english translation text: by this grave which is the place of congregation and in which lies the infallible Imam, the slaughtered, and the oppressed,

arabic text: أنْ تَكْشِفَ ما بي مِنَ الْغُمُومِ،
english translation text: that You dispel from me all that grieves me,

arabic text: وَ تَصْرِفَ عَنّي شَرَّ الْقَدَرِ الْمَحْتُومِ،
english translation text: divert from me the harm of the decisive foreordained plan,

arabic text: وَ تُجيرَني مِنَ النّارِ ذاتِ السَّمُومِ،
english translation text: and give me refuge from the Hellfire with scorching winds.
My Allah! Honor me with Your bounties,
Make me content with Your apportionment,
Encompass me with Your munificence and generosity,

arabic text: وَ باعِدْني مِنْ مَكْرِكَ وَ نِقْمَتِكَ،
english translation text: And keep me far off from Your requital scheme and Your wrath.
O Allah! Protect me from errors,

arabic text: وَ سدِّدْني فِي الْقَوْلِ وَ الْعَمَلِ،
english translation text: Make me firm in speech and action,
Extend for me the period (of life),

arabic text: وَ اعْفِني مِنَ الأوْجاعِ وَ الْعِلَلِ،
english translation text: Relieve me from pain and ailments,

arabic text: وَ بَلِّغْني بِمَوالِيَّ وَ بِفَضْلِكَ أفْضَلَ الأَمَلِ،
english translation text: Make me achieve, through my masters and Your grace, the best of wishes.

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اقْبَلْ تَوْبَتي،
english translation text: O Allah! Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad and accept my repentance and my return,
Have mercy upon my weeping,
Lessen my lapses,
Relieve my distress,
Forgive me my mistake,
And improve my (righteousness) through my children.

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ لا تَدَعْ لي في هذَا الْمَشْهَدِ الْمُعَظَّمِ وَ الْمَحَلِّ الْمُكَرَّمِ ذَنْباً إلاّ غَفَرْتَهُ،
english translation text: My Allah! Do not leave for me, in this exalted and honored place of martyrdom, any sin but that You forgive,
Nor any defect but that You conceal,
Nor any grief but that You remove,
Nor any sustenance but that You extend,
Nor any (spiritual) status but that You cause to prosper,
Nor any corruption but that which You correct,
Nor any wish but that You fulfill,
Nor any supplication but that You answer,
Nor any pressure but that You relieve,
Nor any dispersed (believers) but that You reunify,
Nor any matter but that You complete,
Nor any wealth but that You increase,
Nor any character but that You improve,
Nor any charity but that You repay,
Nor any condition but that You cause to improve,
Nor any envious (one) but that You suppress,
Nor any enemy but that You destroy,
Nor any evil but that You suffice,
Nor any ailment but that You cure,
Nor any distant (one) but that You bring near,
Nor any scattering but that You reunite,
Nor any request but that You grant.
O Allah! I ask You for the goodness of this transitory world,
and the reward of the hereafter.
O Allah! Suffice me with what You made lawful from the unlawful,
and with Your grace from all other creatures.
My Allah! I ask You for beneficial knowledge,
a humble heart,
unequivocal certitude,
pure action,
beautiful patience,
and a bountiful reward.
O Allah! Grant me gratitude of Your blessing upon me,

arabic text: وَ زِدْ في إحْسانِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ إلَىَّ،
english translation text: Increase Your favor and munificence on me,

arabic text: وَ اجْعَلْ قَوْلي فِي النّاسِ مَسْمُوعاً،
english translation text: Make my speech amongst people effective,
my deeds elevated and worthy of being delivered to You,
my righteous works followed (by others),
and my enemy quelled,

arabic text: اَللّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الأخْيارِ، في آناءِ اللَّيْلِ وَ أطْرافِ النَّهارِ،
english translation text: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, the best of the creations, day and night,
Spare me from the evil of the wicked,

arabic text: وَ طَهِّرْني مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ وَ الأوْزارِ،
english translation text: Purify me from sins and burdens,
Give me refuge from Hell-fire,
Settle me in the House of rest (Paradise),

arabic text: وَ اغْفِرْ لي وَ لِجَميعِ إخْواني فيكَ وَ أخَواتِيَ الْمُؤْمِنينَ وَ الْمُؤْمِناتِ،
english translation text: And forgive me and all my faithful brothers and sisters,
By Your mercy, O the most merciful of the merciful!
